```
│   └── Enroll.razor           — Enrollment form (InteractiveServer)
├── Components/Layout/         — Updated nav & branding
└── wwwroot/app.css            — Navy/blue university theme
```

**Key design decisions:**
- **Static SSR** for Home, CourseDetail, Departments (fast page loads on intranet)
- **InteractiveServer** only for Courses (search/filter) and Enroll (form handling)
- Standard `EditForm` for enrollment — no wizards or real-time validation
- Course pre-selection via `?courseId=X` query string on the enroll page

Run with `dotnet run --project UniversityCourseCatalog` to launch.
